product_updates.title: You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
product_updates.content: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini.

product_updates.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
product_updates.content: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

product_updates.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
product_updates.content: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

product_updates.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
product_updates.content: Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

product_updates.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
product_updates.content: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

product_updates.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
product_updates.content: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

product_updates.title: Cohere launches an open source voice model specifically for transcription
product_updates.content: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages.

product_updates.title: A ‘pound of flesh’ from data centers: one senator’s answer to AI job losses
product_updates.content: Fears of AI-driven job loss are growing fast, and they’re fueling backlash against data centers. Sen. Mark Warner suggests taxing them to help workers survive the transition.

product_updates.title: Mistral releases a new open source model for speech generation
product_updates.content: The model, which lets enterprises build voice agents for sales and customer engagement, puts Mistral in direct competition with the likes of ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and OpenAI.

product_updates.title: The least surprising chapter of the Manus story is what’s happening right now
product_updates.content: Did anyone think there would not be a reckoning over this tie-up?

technical_breakthroughs.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
technical_breakthroughs.content: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: a battery pivot to AI, and rewriting math
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: The snow gods: How a couple of ski bums built the internet’s best weather app
technical_breakthroughs.content: The best snow-forecasting app for skiers and snowboarders isn’t from any of the federally funded weather services. Nor from any of the big-name brands. It’s an independent app startup that leverages government data, its own AI models, and decades of alpine-life experience to offer better snow (an…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Are high gas prices good news for EVs? It’s complicated.
technical_breakthroughs.content: I live in a dense city with plentiful public transportation options and limited parking, so I don’t own a car. I’m often utterly clueless about the current price of gasoline. But as the conflict in Iran has escalated, fossil-fuel prices have been on a roller-coaster, and I’ve started paying atten…
